name: react-native-rag-tutorial
description: Production RAG for React Native: a shared retrieval core that runs both on-device and behind a cloud retrieval service, with Claude Opus 4.8 answer synthesis.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @cb/rag-core && npm run build -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @cb/rag-core && npm run typecheck -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @cb/rag-core && npm run test -w server
